testmode.label: Test Mode
testmode.comment: Use the Mollie test API key to process mock payments.

api_key_live.label: Live API Key
api_key_live.comment: Starts with "live_". Find it in your Mollie dashboard under Developers.

api_key_test.label: Test API Key
api_key_test.comment: Starts with "test_". Find it in your Mollie dashboard under Developers.

credentials_checker.label: Test API Key
credentials_checker.comment: Click to verify that the configured API keys can reach the Mollie API.

debug.label: Debug Logging
debug.comment: When enabled, writes verbose reconcile/refund events to var/log/mollie.log.

order_status_pending.label: Pending-payment order status
order_status_pending.comment: Applied while the customer is at the Mollie checkout, before the payment result is known.

order_status_processing.label: Paid (processing) order status
order_status_processing.comment: Applied after a successful Mollie capture (paid/authorized). State remains "processing".

order_status_pending.label: Pending-payment order status
order_status_pending.comment: Applied while the customer is at the Mollie checkout, before the payment result is known.

order_status_processing.label: Paid (processing) order status
order_status_processing.comment: Applied after a successful Mollie capture (paid/authorized). State remains "processing".

order_status_pending.label: Pending-payment order status
order_status_pending.comment: Applied while the customer is at the Mollie checkout, before the payment result is known.

order_status_processing.label: Paid (processing) order status
order_status_processing.comment: Applied after a successful Mollie capture (paid/authorized). State remains "processing".

order_status_pending.label: Pending-payment order status
order_status_pending.comment: Applied while the customer is at the Mollie checkout, before the payment result is known.

order_status_processing.label: Paid (processing) order status
order_status_processing.comment: Applied after a successful Mollie capture (paid/authorized). State remains "processing".

use_components.label: Use Mollie Components (hosted card fields)
use_components.comment: When Yes, render Mollie's PCI-compliant iframe card fields in checkout instead of redirecting to Mollie. Requires the Profile ID below.

profile_id.label: Mollie Profile ID
profile_id.comment: Profile ID for Mollie Components (starts with "pfl_"). Find it in your Mollie dashboard under Developers > API keys.
